notes: Response is analytically strong and surfaces the enriched-insights uncertainty well, but fails on structural artefact requirements: no explicit out-of-scope section with named deferrals and reasons, no success indicators with baseline anchors, MVP is not bounded (enriched insights deferral is recommended but no explicit MVP scope line is drawn), constraints are not named against regulatory sources (Privacy Act 2020, CDR), and personas are generic stakeholder lists without role-context-cost framing.
